detailed_description.heading: Panoramic Surveillance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti G6 Pro 360 White (UVC-G6-Pro-360-W) delivers complete 360° panoramic coverage in a single, elegant camera. Designed to eliminate blind spots, it uses a 1/1.6" 12 MP panoramic sensor to capture ultra-wide, high-resolution images with remarkable detail. This makes it ideal for monitoring open spaces such as retail areas, warehouses, parking lots, and office interiors. Its Smart IR system includes four independently controllable illumination zones, ensuring clear night vision and balanced exposure across the entire field of view. The camera’s weatherproof and impact-resistant enclosure allows reliable outdoor use in harsh conditions while maintaining excellent image performance. With the G6 Pro 360, users can achieve total situational awareness using a single camera instead of multiple conventional units, simplifying installation, reducing maintenance costs, and delivering professional-grade panoramic surveillance for modern security environments.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Imaging & Power
detailed_description.text: Built with professional performance in mind, the UVC-G6-Pro-360-W integrates a quad-core ARM® Cortex®-A53 processor, providing fast image processing, advanced analytics, and efficient data handling. It operates via PoE+ within a 37–57 V DC range, enabling both data and power transmission over a single cable, that is ideal for simplified deployment and cable management. With a maximum power draw of 7.14 W, the camera offers exceptional energy efficiency for continuous operation. Compact yet durable, it provides flexibility for a range of installation scenarios. Combined with its high-quality panoramic sensor and infrared capability, the G6 Pro 360 ensures consistent clarity, even in low-light environments. This balance of power, efficiency, and performance makes it an excellent choice for users who need reliable, all-around surveillance with professional-grade imaging in both indoor and outdoor installations.

detailed_description.heading: Integration & Smart Features
detailed_description.text: Seamlessly integrated into the UniFi Protect ecosystem, the G6 Pro 360 offers complete access to real-time monitoring, recording, and management through both web and mobile applications. Its AI-powered smart detection accurately identifies people, vehicles, and animals, delivering precise alerts while reducing false notifications. Designed for flexible installation, the camera supports ceiling and wall mounting, allowing optimal placement for various environments. Built to withstand harsh conditions, the IP66-rated weatherproof and IK10-rated vandal-resistant housing ensures reliable performance in both indoor and outdoor settings, even in rain, dust, or high-traffic areas. Combined with the intuitive UniFi Protect interface, users can effortlessly manage recordings, configure alerts, and perform firmware updates with enhanced security. Offering a balance of 360° coverage, intelligent analytics, and durable design, the Ubiquiti G6 Pro 360 White is an excellent choice for professional installations that demand robust protection and maximum situational awareness.
